name: CMSTP Proxy Execution
description: Detects CMSTP.exe used to bypass application control and execute arbitrary code
query:
// Detect CMSTP execution with INF file
// Trigger on cmstp.exe loading INF files
events from edr_process
where exe_path matches "(?i)cmstp\.exe$"
  and cmdline matches "(?i)\.inf"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
